parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_delivery_mode' THEN value END) AS default_delivery_mode,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_test_recipient' THEN value END) AS default_test_recipient,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_sender_name' THEN value END) AS email_sender_name,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_signature_template_key' THEN value END) AS email_signature_template_key,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('email_delivery_mode', 'email_test_recipient', 'email_sender_name', 'email_reply_to', 'email_signature_template_key', 'n8n_base_url');

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $('Resolve Preview Request').first().json ?? {};
const sql = `WITH refund_row AS (
  SELECT r.id, r.name, r.refund_for, r.reason, r.membership, r.amount, r.refund, r.months,
         r.from_date, r.to_date, r.status, r.explanation, r.notes,
         r.request_email_message_id, r.bank_details_message_id, r.treasury_email_message_id
  FROM public.refunds r
  WHERE r.id = ${input.refund_id}
  LIMIT 1
), base_member AS (
  SELECT rm.id AS raw_member_id,
         trim(concat_ws(' ', rm."First name", rm."Last name")) AS member_name,
         NULLIF(trim(rm."Email address"), '') AS member_email,
         rm."Membership" AS membership
  FROM public.raw_members rm
  CROSS JOIN refund_row r
  WHERE COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true
    AND trim(concat_ws(' ', rm."First name", rm."Last name")) = r.refund_for
    AND (r.membership IS NULL OR r.membership = '' OR rm."Membership" = r.membership)
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN rm."Membership" = r.membership THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, rm.id
  LIMIT 1
), best_contact AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM refund_row r
  LEFT JOIN base_member bm ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL public.resolve_best_contact_row(
    COALESCE(bm.member_name, r.refund_for),
    COALESCE(bm.member_email, ''),
    NULLIF(regexp_replace(COALESCE(bm.member_name, r.refund_for), '^\\S+\\s*', ''), ''),
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.raw_members rmf
      WHERE COALESCE(rmf.is_current, true) = true
        AND trim(concat_ws(' ', rmf."First name", rmf."Last name")) = COALESCE(bm.member_name, r.refund_for)
        AND rmf."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
    )
  ) bc ON TRUE
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT r.*, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.email_address), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(bm.member_email), '')) AS member_email
FROM refund_row r
LEFT JOIN base_member bm ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN best_contact bc ON TRUE;`;
return [{ json: { ...input, sql } }];
